item2_leadership.note: All officers/directors extracted with full roles, tenures, and prior positions in A1

obligations: fees (royalty, fund, cooperative, local, transfer, successor, training, etc.)

item10_financing.note: No financing offered; no guarantee of notes, leases, or obligations

obligations: Maintain certified manager shift coverage (10-14 shifts/week)
Attend annual franchisee meeting (up to 4 days)
English fluency required for all managers and customer-contact employees
restrictions: May not open before training completion
Expelled trainees wait 6 months to re-apply
rights: Request additional training at end of initial program
Volunteer for Regional Certified Training Store program

obligations: Provide delivery only in designated area
Comply with delivery area changes immediately
restrictions: No options or rights of first refusal for additional franchises
triggers: Franchisor may change delivery area at any time for any reason

restrictions: Must stop using marks if directed
rights: Franchisor reimburses damages from authorized use disputes

obligations: Keep confidential info absolutely confidential during and after term
restrictions: May not remove manual from restaurant
May not copy or distribute manual

obligations: Have Operations Partner with ≥5% ownership (or GM for Sophisticated Franchisee)
All owners sign Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations
Disclose investments in other restaurant/food businesses
restrictions: OP may not work for other restaurant/food business (unless Sophisticated Franchisee)
Franchisor may regulate min/max prices for all channels
